creator: Connie Loizos
title: (No AI) At his OpenAI trial, Musk relitigates an old friendship
dc:creator: Connie Loizos
content: It's a story Musk has told before -- in interviews and to author Walter Isaacson for his bestselling biography of Musk -- but Tuesday was the first time he said it under oath.
contentSnippet: It's a story Musk has told before -- in interviews and to author Walter Isaacson for his bestselling biography of Musk -- but Tuesday was the first time he said it under oath.

creator: Julie Bort
title: (No AI) Amazon is already offering new OpenAI products on AWS
dc:creator: Julie Bort
content: A day after OpenAI got Microsoft to agree to end exclusive rights, AWS announced a slate of OpenAI model offerings, including a new agent service.
contentSnippet: A day after OpenAI got Microsoft to agree to end exclusive rights, AWS announced a slate of OpenAI model offerings, including a new agent service.

title: (No AI) Elon Musk appeared more petty than prepared
author: Elizabeth Lopatto
content:
![Elon Musk in front of a background of justice scales.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/04/STK022_ELON_MUSK_CVIRGINIA4_G.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Today the first witness was sworn in in _Musk v. Altman:_ Elon Musk. I was surprised by how flat he seemed.

This is not the first time I've seen Musk in court. During his defamation suit, [he turned on the charm](https://www.theverge.com/2019/12/4/20994895/elon-musk-testimony-vernon-unsworth-tweet-negligence-la-courthouse) and the jury responded by [finding him not guilty.](https://www.theverge.com/2019/12/6/20998821/elon-musk-wins-loses-twitter-defamation-trial-testimony-caver-vernon-unsworth-cave-rescue) Today he looked adrift and unprepared. The only times he showed real animation were when he was [bragging about how much he'd done for OpenAI](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/920048/elon-musk-testimony-save-humanity).

The direct examination is a way of telling a story through questions; it's important to make the narrative clear. For a suit that accuses Sam Altman of straying from OpenAI's mission, Musk spent a weird amount of time talking about himself, recou …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/920191/elon-musk-sam-altman-trial-day-one)
contentSnippet:
Today the first witness was sworn in in Musk v. Altman: Elon Musk. I was surprised by how flat he seemed.
This is not the first time I've seen Musk in court. During his defamation suit, he turned on the charm and the jury responded by finding him not guilty. Today he looked adrift and unprepared. The only times he showed real animation were when he was bragging about how much he'd done for OpenAI.
The direct examination is a way of telling a story through questions; it's important to make the narrative clear. For a suit that accuses Sam Altman of straying from OpenAI's mission, Musk spent a weird amount of time talking about himself, recou …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: (No AI) Elon Musk tells the jury that all he wants to do is save humanity
author: Kevin Nguyen
content:
![Elon Musk in front of a background of geometric shapes.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/04/STK022_ELON_MUSK_CVIRGINIA4_J.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

On the stand, Elon Musk is positioning himself as a savior.

[In the high-profile trial between him and his fellow OpenAI co-founder, now CEO, Sam Altman](https://www.theverge.com/tech/917225/sam-altman-elon-musk-openai-lawsuit), Musk opened by going through his background. He went as far back as being raised in South Africa and arriving in Canada for college with "2,500 in Canadian travelers' checks and a bag of clothes and books," then spent an unusually long time talking about his past, from Zip2 to PayPal to the current, more familiar slate of companies he now runs.

Why is Musk giving the jury so much of his origin story? Though he may be, depending on the day, the world's wealthiest individual, Musk suggested …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/920048/elon-musk-testimony-save-humanity)

Why is Musk giving the jury so much of his origin story? Though he may be, depending on the day, the world's wealthiest individual, Musk suggested  …

creator: Will Knight
title: (No AI) OpenAI Really Wants Codex to Shut Up About Goblins
dc:creator: Will Knight
content: “Never talk about goblins, gremlins, raccoons, trolls, ogres, pigeons, or other animals or creatures unless it is absolutely and unambiguously relevant,” reads OpenAI’s coding agent instructions.
contentSnippet: “Never talk about goblins, gremlins, raccoons, trolls, ogres, pigeons, or other animals or creatures unless it is absolutely and unambiguously relevant,” reads OpenAI’s coding agent instructions.

creator: Paresh Dave, Maxwell Zeff
title: (No AI) Elon Musk Testifies That He Started OpenAI to Prevent a ‘Terminator Outcome’
dc:creator: Paresh Dave, Maxwell Zeff
content: The judge also warned Musk and Sam Altman to curb their “propensity to use social media to make things worse outside the courtroom” after both sides traded attacks online.
contentSnippet: The judge also warned Musk and Sam Altman to curb their “propensity to use social media to make things worse outside the courtroom” after both sides traded attacks online.
